text: The sound quality is absolutely crisp with punchy bass, but the charging cable provided is laughably short.
They arrived yesterday. I put them in my ears. They play music. That's about it.
Battery lasts for days, which is great, however the fit is so painful I can't wear them for more than 20 minutes.
Paisa vasool! Bass ekdum mast hai, ANC is decent for a noisy office.
Wow, I just love it when my music pauses randomly every 5 minutes. Best feature ever.
Connectivity is seamless with my iPhone. Mic quality drops significantly in windy areas though.
It is what it is. You get what you pay for.
Loved the matte black finish of the case. The touch controls are a bit too sensitive though, keeps skipping tracks.
Sound stage is surprisingly wide. Unfortunately, the right earbud arrived with a massive scratch.
Not the best, not the worst. Just another pair of TWS in a crowded market.
Excellent noise isolation. Call quality could be slightly better, but overall very satisfied.
Super fast delivery! Pity the product inside was completely dead and won't charge.
Bhai overall thik hai. Battery backup solid hai par case thoda cheap plastic lagta hai.
I'm conflicted. Highs are sharp, lows are muddy.
Great for gym use because they literally never fall out. The app UI needs a total redesign though.
Transparency mode is excellent! Too bad the max volume is so low I can barely hear my podcasts.
Hard to say if I'd recommend them to a friend. They have good days and bad days.
Outstanding value for money. The vocals are clear, even if the bass lacks a bit of depth.
A masterclass in how NOT to build a microphone. People think I'm talking from inside a washing machine.
Charging speed is phenomenal. Spatial audio feels a bit gimmicky but it's fun.
My sister bought these. I use them sometimes. They seem fine I guess.
Case hinge is very loose and feels flimsy, but the actual audio output is studio-grade.
Amazing how they managed to make earbuds that fit nobody's ears correctly.
Ek number product! Bass is thumping, pairing is fast, only issue is the glossy case attracts fingerprints.
They function as intended.
The multipoint connection works flawlessly between my Mac and phone. Sometimes there is an audio lag in games.
Oh absolutely, spending 3000 rupees for one working earbud is exactly what I wanted to do today.
Very lightweight, you forget you're wearing them. ANC struggles with high-frequency noises like typing.
The hardware is brilliant but the companion software keeps crashing on Android 14.
Honestly, I have no strong feelings about these earbuds either way.
Best budget ANC earbuds! They block out engine noise on flights perfectly. Mic is strictly average.
Delivery was exceptionally quick. Too bad they sent me a used unit with earwax still on it. Gross.
Call quality indoor is 10/10. Outdoor call quality is 2/10. Wind noise ruins it.
Different from what I expected based on the YouTube reviews.
Fantastic battery life (got 7 hours on a single charge), but the case takes ages to recharge.
Sound quality is easily a 5-star, but I'm rating it 2-stars because customer service ignored my emails for a week.
It's an audio product that emits audio.
Premium feel without the premium price. Bass is a bit overpowering out of the box, fixed it via EQ.
I love paying for premium shipping just to receive a crushed box with shattered earbuds inside.
Dikhne mein bohot premium hai. Sound mast hai. But mic pe awaaz echo hoti hai.
I'm on the fence about these. Sometimes the Bluetooth range is 30 feet, sometimes it's 3 feet.
Vocals are incredibly clear for classical music. If you are a basshead, look elsewhere, these lack punch.
The earbuds look great and sound great, but the left ear tip was missing from the package.
Perfect for running, they don't budge. The case is a bit too bulky for tight jeans pockets though.
They are earbuds. Buy them if you need earbuds.
Such a wonderful design choice to make the LED lights blink brightly in the dark while I'm trying to sleep.
Audio sync with YouTube is perfect. However, there is noticeable latency when playing Call of Duty.
Hardware is solid. Software requires location access just to change EQ settings? Hard pass.
I don't know what to write here. They work.
Incredible instrument separation. You can hear every guitar string. The silicone tips could be softer.
Amazing product, if your goal is to be frustrated by constant random disconnects every hour.
Fit is super snug. ANC is decent. Mics pick up literally every dog barking in a 2-mile radius.
It's exactly a 2000 rupee earbud. Don't expect magic.
Battery lasts a lifetime. The touch sensors are awful, you can't adjust them without pausing the song.
Great sound out of the box, but after 3 days the volume on the right side dropped by 50%.
Superb build quality! The matte finish is great. The companion app needs an English translation fix though.
Meh.
Yes, please force me to create an account and sign in just to use my Bluetooth headphones. Brilliant.
They survive heavy sweat at the gym easily. The case lid feels like it might break if I drop it once.
Sound is clear, bass is heavy. Too bad they start hurting my ear canals after exactly 45 minutes.
Could be better, could be worse.
Ekdum bawal sound hai! Treble is sharp, bass is deep. Call connectivity is sometimes slow.
The 'low latency gaming mode' actually adds more latency. Irony at its finest.
Excellent mids and highs. The transparency mode sounds very artificial and robotic though.
Purchased on sale. Probably wouldn't buy at full price.
Everything was going great until the firmware update today. Now my left bud keeps disconnecting.
Sound is awesome but after the new update, the left earbud drains battery in 10 minutes.
DO NOT UPDATE FIRMWARE. Left bud completely bricked after v1.4 update this morning.
Still working perfectly for me, I ignored the update notification. ANC is amazing!
Sound is okay. Did anyone else's left side stop working today?
Left earbud keeps dropping connection every 2 seconds since I updated the app.
Good fit, nice case. Left earbud seems glitchy since yesterday though.
Update v1.4 ruined these. Left bud is totally unresponsive now.
Paisa vasool, but don't download the new update, my friend did and his left bud died.
Left side firmware bug! How did this pass QA testing?
My left earbud is now a paperweight thanks to your mandatory update.
Great bass, but the left bud disconnects when I walk.
Firmware completely killed the left earpiece. Unusable.
Left bud dead after update.
Sound quality is 5/5. Software engineering is 0/5. Fix the left bud update issue!
Is there a fix for the left earbud disconnecting? Happened right after the app update.
Average product. Left bud works only if I hold my head perfectly still.
Left side totally gone. This is a scam.
Thanks for the update that broke the left earbud. Really helpful.
Excellent if you only have a right ear, because the left bud is completely dead after updating.
Left bud disconnect issue. Everyone is facing it. Roll back the update!
The right bud sounds fantastic. The left bud sounds like silence since yesterday.
Bhai update ke baad left wala band ho gaya. Kya bakwas hai.
Update v1.4 = Left Bud Destroyer.
Fix your software! Left earbud keeps cutting out constantly.
Loved them for a month. Now the left side is buggy due to the software patch.
Left earpiece will not connect to Bluetooth anymore.
Great job breaking the left earbud with your latest update. Refund me.
Adding my name to the list of people whose left earbud died after updating.
Left bud disconnecting loop. Impossible to use.
Very comfortable to wear, but utterly useless since the left side won't play audio anymore.
Left bud bricked. Support is not replying.
I'm returning these. Left side stopped working, which is a shame because they sounded good.
Update completely fried the Bluetooth chip in the left bud.
Left side issues are real. Don't buy until they patch the software.
They work great if you don't install the companion app! No left bud issues for me!
My left earbud is playing a static noise after the update.
Left bud connectivity is completely broken.
The right bud still has amazing ANC. Wish I could say the same for the dead left one.
Left wala update ke baad chal hi nahi raha.
Widespread issue with the left bud. Check Reddit. Product is flawed.
Left earbud pairing rejected by phone after updating firmware.
Zero audio from left side. Factory reset doesn't help.
Still no patch for the left earbud issue? Pathetic customer service.
The battery case is great, holds a lot of charge. Left bud is dead though.
Left side firmware glitch.
Left bud completely silent.
Would be 5 stars if the left earbud hadn't stopped working after the update.
I love listening to music in mono because the left bud is broken. So retro.
Left bud bricked by v1.4.
Software update killed the left earpiece. Beware.
Sound is incredible. Left bud glitch is super annoying, hoping for a fix soon.
Left earbud disconnects randomly.
Update ruined the left side.
Left bud dead.
Fit is great. Left side audio is gone.
Left earbud is a goner after the patch.
Left side stopped working.
Left bud connectivity issue is ruining the experience.
Left bud doesn't turn on.
Right side is perfect. Left side is dead. Averages out to 3 stars I guess.
Left earbud died after software update.
Left side completely bricked.
Right bud connects instantly. Left bud refuses to pair.
Left bud firmware issue.
Not sure what the hype is about. They are just earbuds.
Great battery. Awful mic. Good fit. Bad case.
The bass is so boosted it gives me a headache. Mids are totally drowned out.
Amazing! Even survived a drop in a puddle. The volume doesn't go very high though.
They arrived.
I bought these for zoom calls. The mic is so bad my boss told me to buy new ones.
Packaging was beautiful. The earbuds sound a bit hollow until you tweak the EQ.
ANC is top tier, filters out the subway completely. Mics catch too much wind.
They look very premium but feel very cheap and hollow in the hand.
Whatever.
Right earbud volume is 20% louder than the left earbud out of the box. Unbalanced.
Very comfortable for sleeping. The touch controls trigger against my pillow though.
Case scratches if you even look at it wrong. Sound is decent.
Absolutely brilliant soundstage. The silicone tips attract a lot of dust.
I've had better, I've had worse.
Keeps disconnecting from my laptop every 15 minutes. Very frustrating.
Mic is crystal clear indoors. ANC is non-existent.
Fast pairing is a blessing. The case magnet is too weak, earbuds fall out in my bag.
Vocals are harsh and piercing at high volumes. Good battery though.
A completely average listening experience.
They look identical to the Airpods, which is cool. The sound is a bit muddy in the lows.
Stopped charging entirely after 2 weeks. Garbage.
Ek number bass! Treble thoda zyada hai but overall best in segment.
It functions.
Lightweight and comfy. The multipoint connection glitches when switching devices.
Why is the voice prompt so loud? "BLUETOOTH CONNECTED" blasts my eardrums every time.
Fantastic isolation, you don't even need ANC. Case is a fingerprint magnet.
The latency on these makes watching movies impossible. Lips move, sound comes a second later.
Purchased as a backup pair. They do the job.
Very clear instrumentals. The new update messed up the left earbud connectivity though.
Left side is dead.
Amazing product! (I didn't update the firmware so both my buds still work perfectly).
Left bud disconnects randomly since v1.4.
Okay sound. Left side is very glitchy after updating.
Left earbud totally bricked.
Loved the ANC but left side doesn't play music anymore.
Left bud issue. Pls fix.
The bass is phenomenal. Wish the left bud worked after the stupid update.
Left side firmware bug.
My left earbud is dead.
Neutral review because right bud is great, left bud is dead.
Left bud won't pair.
Software update killed my left earbud.
Comfortable fit. Left bud has zero audio.
Left bud is completely useless now.
Firmware bug ruined the left side.
Sound is nice. Left bud connection drops.
Left bud dead.
Left earbud stopped working.
Left side dead after update.
No opinion really.
Good sound, terrible mic.
Case feels premium, buds feel cheap.
Best battery, worst app interface.
Great box, broken product inside.
Fine.
Nice treble, flat bass.
Good connectivity, awful latency.
Mast sound, ghatiya case.
They exist.
